mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ranking (user_id, song_id, rank, score, play_time, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{songId}, #{rank}, #{score}, #{timeSeconds}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ranking WHERE song_id = #{songId} ORDER BY score DESC, play_time ASC LIMIT 5
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rankings (user_id, song_id, score) VALUES (#{userId}, #{songId}, #{score}, NOW())
INSERT INTO ranking (user_id, song_id, `rank`, score, play_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{songId}, #{rank}, #{score}, #{playTime})
